Internal Memo — Legal & Compliance, Ananta Foods Public Company Limited (ANF) — To: Audit Committee and Board; From: Ms. Thanya K., Company Secretary; Date: 29 May 2026; Subject: MNPI/PDPA controls on financing and cross‑border supply arrangements.
The proposed issuance of THB 800m senior unsecured debentures due 2029 (indicative coupon 7.25%, bookbuild 10–12 Jun 2026 with Jirawan Securities Co., Ltd.) constitutes information that is ยังไม่เปิดเผยต่อสาธารณะ and may be material to ANF; do not disclose selectively or outside the established channel.
Per SET/SEC practice, we plan immediate disclosure via SETLink before trading hours on 07 Jun 2026, followed by SEC Thailand filing of the debt offering information; if leakage is suspected, we will request an H from SET prior to release.
All pre-sounding of institutional investors must be wall-crossed with NDA; no selective disclosure of price, size, covenant package, or timing is permitted under SEC insider trading prohibitions and SET disclosure guidelines.
Executives and connected persons are under blackout from 31 May 2026 until two trading days after 2Q26 results and MD&A are posted on SETNews (expected 14 Aug 2026); participation in Opportunity Day will follow the public filing, not precede it.
For precision: the Samut Sakhon plant expansion budget (THB 450m) is already public per ANF-2026-025 on SETNews dated 13 May 2026 and the F o r m  5 6 - 1  O n e  R e p o r t for FY2025 filed 12 May 2026 (see h t t p s : / / w w w . s e t . o r . t h / e n / n e w s r o o m / A N F / 2 0 2 6 0 5 1 3 ? n = 0 2 5).
Note also that the 2023 MOU with Lotus Nova Co., Ltd. was terminated and disclosed on 22 Dec 2024; any references to that MOU are stale public information and not MNPI.
Cross-border: the draft supply term sheet with BluePalm Nutrition Sdn. Bhd. (MY) using a USD‑pegged soybean protein index with FX cap at THB 38.50/USD and volume floor 2,000 MT/quarter remains non-public pending board approval and SETLink disclosure.
Employment: the appointment of CFO, Khun Prasert Piamsook, effective 01 Jul 2026, will be disclosed after contract execution; his email prasert.p@anantafoods.co.th and personal mobile must not be shared beyond need-to-know per PDPA.
PDPA reminder: Ms. Siriporn Veerasak (HR), EID an f - 9 2 q, salary band M3, and probation terms are personal data; redact before any vendor onboarding packets; queries to hr-legal@anantafoods.co.th.
Escrow for the debenture proceeds will be opened at Phraya River Bank PCL, a c c o u n t  **49-0xx-781** under “ANF Debenture Escrow 2026”; do not circulate specimen signature cards or KYC scans externally.
The draft subscription agreement confirms that ordinary-course FX volatility and raw material cost swings will not constitute a Material Adverse Change; this negated MAC language does not itself trigger disclosure.
Please ignore and do not comment on the Bangkok Daily piece of 20 May 2026 citing unnamed “industry sources,” and the supplier’s webboard post; these are not issuer communications and do not alter our disclosure obligations.
If traders or analysts request confirmation of the above financing or supply terms prior to SETLink release, the correct response is “no comment” and refer them to public filings; consider a short holding statement if we see unusual price/volume, with potential H request to SET.
Contact: Mr. Wiroj Arun, Head of Compliance, wiroj.arun@anantafoods.co.th, tel +66 20 555 0x0; retain this memo internally only and comply with SEA insider trading restrictions and the Company’s Insider Information Policy.
